hackathons.title: AI GENESIS
hackathons.description:
AI Genesis is a global hybrid hackathon that brings AI builders together from around the world — starting online and culminating live at /function1 AI Conference & Exhibition 2026 in Dubai.

📅Oct 26 – Nov 3, 2026
• Oct 26 – Nov 2: Online build & collaboration
All projects must be submitted by end of day on November 2. 
• Nov 2 (Online + Dubai): An exclusive on-site build day in Dubai for selected participants.
• Nov 3 (Dubai): Live on-stage pitching & winners announcement at the /function1 Confe

hackathons.title: IndiaAI Startups Global - International Acceleration Programs for Indian AI Startups
hackathons.description: MeitY / IndiaAI international acceleration tracks placing Indian AI startups into global programs. Rolling cohorts.
hackathons.benefits: Placement into international acceleration tracks, plus government backing and global market access.

hackathons.title: Y Combinator (AI startups)
hackathons.description: Twice-yearly batches; AI-heavy. ~$500k standard deal.
hackathons.eligibility: Any early-stage startup with a founding team; pre-launch and idea-stage are welcome.
hackathons.benefits: ~$500K on the standard deal, a 3-month program, and the lifelong YC network + Demo Day.

hackathons.title: Antler Residency (AI)
hackathons.description: Day-zero residency for founders incl. AI; rolling cohorts across 30+ cities.
hackathons.eligibility: Solo founders welcome — no company or co-founder needed.
hackathons.benefits: Pre-seed cash, a co-founder matching residency, and hands-on mentorship.

hackathons.title: Techstars AI Accelerators
hackathons.description: Multiple AI-focused Techstars programs; rolling applications by location.
hackathons.eligibility: Early-stage startups; apply to the city/track that fits your team.
hackathons.benefits: Seed investment, a 3-month mentor-driven program, and a global investor network.

hackathons.title: NVIDIA Inception
hackathons.description: Free program for AI/ML startups: GPU credits, go-to-market, VC intros. Rolling.
hackathons.eligibility: Any AI/ML startup at any stage — free to join.
hackathons.benefits: GPU and cloud credits, go-to-market support, and introductions to VCs.

hackathons.title: Google for Startups AI Accelerator
hackathons.description: Equity-free AI accelerator with seasonal cohorts and regional tracks (incl. India).
hackathons.eligibility: Seed-to-Series-A AI startups; regional tracks including India.
hackathons.benefits: An equity-free program, Google mentorship, and cloud credits.
